allow: PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://unsplash.com/napi/search/photos?query=olive+grove&per_page=6&orientation=landscape" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 25 -Headers @{"User-Agent"="Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\)"}; $j = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $j.results | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.id\) | $\($_.width\)x$\($_.height\) | $\($_.description\) $\($_.alt_description\)" })

Anthidona. Greece.jpg" }; foreach \($k in $files.Keys\) { try { $u = "https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/Special:FilePath/" + [uri]::EscapeDataString\($files[$k]\) + "?width=1600"; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $u -OutFile "C:\\Users\\ADMIN\\Desktop\\ex\\assets\\img\\candidates\\$k.jpg" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60 -Headers @{"User-Agent"="KeremAdarSiteBuilder/1.0 \(personal project; gemimed@gmail.com\)"} -ErrorAction Stop; $size = \(Get-Item "C:\\Users\\ADMIN\\Desktop\\ex\\assets\\img\\candidates\\$k.jpg"\).Length; "$k OK $\([math]::Round\($size/1KB\)\)KB" } catch { "$k FAIL $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 6 })

PowerShell($qs = @{ "bottle"="olive oil bottle filemime:image/png"; "branch"="olive branch filemime:image/png"; "lemon"="lemon fruit filemime:image/png"; "rosemary"="rosemary filemime:image/png"; "artichoke"="artichoke filemime:image/png"; "walnut"="walnut filemime:image/png"; "tomato"="tomato filemime:image/png" }; foreach \($k in $qs.Keys\) { try { $u = "https://commons.wikimedia.org/w/api.php?action=query&generator=search&gsrsearch=" + [uri]::EscapeDataString\($qs[$k]\) + "&gsrnamespace=6&gsrlimit=4&prop=imageinfo&iiprop=url|size&format=json"; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $u -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 25 -Headers @{"User-Agent"="KeremAdarSiteBuilder/1.0 \(gemimed@gmail.com\)"} -ErrorAction Stop; $j = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; if \($j.query.pages\) { $j.query.pages.PSObject.Properties.Value | ForEach-Object { "$k | $\($_.title\) | $\($_.imageinfo[0].width\)x$\($_.imageinfo[0].height\)" } } else { "$k NO_RESULTS" } } catch { "$k FAIL" }; Start-Sleep 3 })

PowerShell($files = [ordered]@{ "lemon"="Citrus limon extracted 1.png"; "rosemary"="Rosmarin.png"; "bottle-w"="OliveOil.png"; "raggia"="Olio Monovarietale di Raggia.png" }; foreach \($k in $files.Keys\) { try { $u = "https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/Special:FilePath/" + [uri]::EscapeDataString\($files[$k]\); Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $u -OutFile "C:\\Users\\ADMIN\\Desktop\\ex\\assets\\img\\cand\\$k.png" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60 -Headers @{"User-Agent"="KeremAdarSiteBuilder/1.0 \(gemimed@gmail.com\)"} -ErrorAction Stop; "$k OK" } catch { "$k FAIL $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; Start-Sleep 5 }; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; foreach \($k in $files.Keys\) { $p = "C:\\Users\\ADMIN\\Desktop\\ex\\assets\\img\\cand\\$k.png"; if \(Test-Path $p\) { $bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\($p\); "$k alpha corners: $\($bmp.GetPixel\(2,2\).A\),$\($bmp.GetPixel\($bmp.Width-3,$bmp.Height-3\).A\) center: $\($bmp.GetPixel\([int]\($bmp.Width/2\),[int]\($bmp.Height/2\)\).A\)"; $bmp.Dispose\(\) } })

PowerShell($qs = @\("olive extracted filemime:image/png", "olives cut out filemime:image/png", "bottle extracted filemime:image/png", "tomato extracted filemime:image/png", "walnuts extracted filemime:image/png", "pepper extracted filemime:image/png", "garlic extracted filemime:image/png", "leaf extracted olive filemime:image/png"\); foreach \($q in $qs\) { try { $u = "https://commons.wikimedia.org/w/api.php?action=query&generator=search&gsrsearch=" + [uri]::EscapeDataString\($q\) + "&gsrnamespace=6&gsrlimit=5&prop=imageinfo&iiprop=size&format=json"; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $u -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 25 -Headers @{"User-Agent"="KeremAdarSiteBuilder/1.0 \(gemimed@gmail.com\)"} -ErrorAction Stop; $j = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; if \($j.query.pages\) { $j.query.pages.PSObject.Properties.Value | ForEach-Object { "[$q] $\($_.title\) $\($_.imageinfo[0].width\)x$\($_.imageinfo[0].height\)" } } else { "[$q] NONE" } } catch { "[$q] FAIL" }; Start-Sleep 3 })
